diagrams.title: OS Position in Computer System
diagrams.description: Shows OS as intermediary between hardware and applications
elements: Hardware - CPU, Memory, I/O Devices (bottom layer)
Arrows showing OS managing hardware and serving applications
diagrams.purpose: Understanding OS role as intermediary and resource manager

diagrams.title: OS Layered Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of a typical Operating System
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing modular OS structure and how layers interact

diagrams.title: System Call Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how user programs interact with OS through system calls
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the mechanism of user-kernel communication

diagrams.title: OS Functions Overview
diagrams.description: Shows all major OS management functions
